title: 8 Things a Real Brotherhood Actually Does
caption:
A group chat is not a brotherhood.

Brotherhood is two or three men who have your number, know your sin, and will show up when it costs them something. Not a podcast community. Not a Discord. Two or three actual guys — in your city, at your table, on the phone when it's 10 PM and things have gone wrong.

Here's what it actually looks like when it's real:

He picks up the phone. He knows your sin. He says the thing you don't want to hear — and says it for you, not at you. He stays when you've made a mess of things.

"Bear one another's burdens." — Galatians 6:2.

If you don't have that, go build it. It won't come to you.

Save this. Share it with the man you want to be that for.

#faith #christianmen #brotherhood #accountability #godlymen #manofgod #community #christianity #theethosapp
